title: sesameless Easter Decorations 25PCS Daisy Flower Heads Artificial Fake Gerbera Petals White Silk Bulk Flower Heads Decorative Daisies for Crafts Wreath Easter Bonnet for Adults
features: 【Value Pack】You will receive 25pcs of the white daisy flower head with yellow center. The diameter of each flower head is about 4cm/1.57inch.
【Premium Material】Each of our daisy flower head is made of high quality silk fabric. As artificial flowers, their feel and appearance can be 90% realistic.

【Ideal Size】The diameter of each daisy flower head is 4cm/1.57inch. It is a great size for your handmade decorations. All you need to do is just to take a glue and you can stick it to anywhere you want to decorate.

【Widely Usage】With these artificial daisies, you can DIY them to anyway you want. You can use them to make Easter wreath, as well as your handcraft project, or you can stick them on headdresses, hats or clothes, or you can place them on any party occasions.

【Applicable in Multi-Scenarios】These daisy flower heads will add sparkle to your Easter event. Use them to decorate your Easter ribbons, wreaths or eggs. In addition, you can also use them for any party decoration, on gift bags, champagne glasses, or on your banners.
